domain.title: Domain & booking URL
domain.subtitle: Configure how customers access this organization's online booking page and portal.

security.title: Domain security
security.forceHttpsHint: Redirect HTTP traffic to secure connection
security.protectionHint: Require customer login to view prices

guide.title: Setup guide
guide.subtitle: Follow these steps to point your custom domain to the platform.
guide.step1Desc: Log into your domain provider (e.g. GoDaddy, Namecheap) and add a new CNAME record.
guide.step3Desc: Click "Verify domain" in the custom domain section. Propagation may take up to 24 hours.

preview.title: Customer view
preview.subtitle: Preview of the active booking portal.
preview.heading: Book an appointment

members.title: Workspace members
members.subtitle: Manage users, staff, and administrators with access to your spa platform.

branding.title: Branding & appearance
branding.subtitle: Customize how your spa brand appears across the admin dashboard, booking portal, and customer emails.

logo.title: Logo & icon
logo.primaryHint: Displayed on dashboard headers and booking pages. Transparent PNG recommended.
logo.faviconHint: Displayed in browser tabs and as a mobile app icon. Square PNG or ICO.

typography.title: Typography
typography.heading: Heading font
typography.bodyPreview: Relax. Restore. Rejuvenate. Our premium treatments are designed to elevate your wellbeing and soothe your soul.

preview.title: Live preview
preview.subtitle: See how your branding appears to users.

feature.title: Feature modules
feature.subtitle: Enable or disable platform modules to perfectly customize your spa's operational capabilities.

booking.title: Booking system
booking.desc: Allow customers to schedule appointments online and manage your internal calendar.

services.title: Services & treatments
services.desc: Manage spa treatments, service categories, durations, and pricing rules.

crm.title: Customer CRM
crm.desc: Manage client profiles, visit histories, preferences, and loyalty points.

staff.title: Staff management
staff.desc: Manage employees, track working hours, and assign specialties.

reports.title: Reports & analytics
reports.desc: View business performance insights, revenue, and staff utilization.

blog.title: Blog CMS
blog.desc: Create SEO articles and marketing content for your booking portal.

marketing.title: Marketing automation
marketing.desc: Run targeted campaigns, promotions, and automated emails.

inventory.title: Inventory management
inventory.desc: Track retail products, professional supplies, and stock levels across branches.

recruitment.title: Recruitment pipeline
recruitment.desc: Manage job postings, applicant tracking, and hiring workflows.

ai.title: AI marketing assistant
ai.desc: Automatically generate email copy, social media posts, and blog articles using advanced AI tailored to your spa brand.

analytics.title: Advanced analytics pro
analytics.desc: Unlock deep insights with custom report builders, predictive forecasting, and real-time dashboard exports.

multiloc.title: Multi-location intelligence
multiloc.desc: Designed for franchises. Compare branch performance, balance staff workloads across locations, and unify global inventory.

preview.title: Module preview
preview.cap2Desc: Prevents double bookings and manages staff availability gaps automatically.
preview.cap3Desc: Automated email and SMS reminders to reduce no-shows.
